maxAmountUsdc.description: Hard spend cap. The skill refuses any single 402 payment above this many USDC. Default: 1.0.

allowMainnet.description: Must be true to authorize real-money payments on solana-mainnet. Default: false (devnet only).

rpcUrl.description: Optional Solana RPC URL override (use a private RPC in production). Defaults to the public endpoint for the selected network.
